hashtag_signals.caption: CHILLGUY is a Solana-based memecoin that became a viral TikTok trend in 2024, inspired by the 'Just a Chill Guy' character. Driven by TikTok virality among Gen Z, it surged over 6,000% within days, reaching a market cap exceeding $700 million.

hashtag_signals.caption: The viral TikTok meme coin 'Chill Guy' (CHILLGUY) has rapidly gained popularity on social media and within the crypto community. Launched on Solana, the token features a mascot created by artist Phillip Banks and became a sensation on TikTok.
